title: blood mod
description: This mod is all about blood or well the idea of using blood to make weapons and tools we have 2 types of blood weapons including blood and compressed blood.
body:
- as you know by the title of the mod this is all about blood now i cant tell you aboutn all the recipes because it will take litteral essays to explain all of them so please use JEI or some recipe mod for it. but what i can tell you is all of the stats for all of the weapons now all of these weapons have 100,000 durability so never worry about them breaking!
- Blood Sword
> 50 damage {25 hearts}
> 20 attack speed 
- Blood pickaxe
> can mine up to netherite
> better then diamond efficiency 3
when right clicked at the block below you it will shoot a potion which will give you a short timed strength 2 and speed 2 potion {Can Be Spammed}
- Blood armor
> way better then netherite.
> imagen enchants!
- blood bow
> fast
> 5 damage per arrow {not including speed factor}
- Blood CrossBow
> little slower then blood bow
> deals 100 damage per arrow {not including speed factor}
- Both blood bow and blood cross bow
> shoot fire arrows.
> dont require arrows to shoot {aka you dont need arrows to fire it nor does it take arrows.}
- Blood Shield
> good for blocking duh.
- Compressed versions
> DOUBLE the stats of the OG {original} blood counterpart!
- Blood Gem
> deals 40000 damage {20,000 hearts]
> can shoot fire balls which is also spammable.
